results.name: Legacy auth import gate
results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import pathlib,re,sys
root=pathlib.Path('/home/oli/dev/brain-v2/backend/app')
pat=re.compile(r'^from app\.core\.security import',re.M)
viol=[]
for p in root.rglob('*.py'):
    if p.name=='auth_deps.py':
        continue
    txt=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if pat.search(txt):
        viol.append(str(p))
if viol:
    print('Legacy imports found:')
    print('\n'.join(viol))
    sys.exit(1)
print('No legacy imports outside compatibility shim.')
PY
tail: No legacy imports outside compatibility shim.
